subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — it was great meeting you at the conference, and we’d be glad to continue the conversation.

I can propose the following time windows for a 30-minute introductory call, all in our local time zone:

- 2026-04-21, between 14:00 and 16:00
- 2026-04-22, between 14:00 and 16:00
- 2026-04-23, between 14:00 and 16:00

Please let me know which day works best for you and your team, and we’ll lock in a specific time and send a calendar invite.

Regarding direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For senior-level technical discussions, please use the public contact channels listed on our website, and we’ll coordinate the appropriate participants on our side.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Role]
